experiments.description: run 3 baseline — 20 strict evals × 8 scenarios; E6/E7/E8 fail on private ctor / *Service in Red Flags / ambiguous comment
fix Pattern B comment Application/Domain → defined in Domain (write path)
add private constructor + static Create factory to Order aggregate in Domain Events
add *Service anti-pattern to Red Flags (was only in Pattern A callout)
add CQRS Bus callout: 3 explicit named conditions — logging, validation pipeline, read/write asymmetry
tried moving DDD optional table before patterns — E5+E12 regressed; reverted
add 'Aggregate vs POCO test' callout — if you never write if/throw to protect state, it has no invariants
add Iron Law callout with 4 concrete violation examples + specific import statements
tried adding IDomainService interface concept — 0 improvement, added complexity; reverted
in CancelOrderUseCase, explicit UserId typed param + comment; E11 strict passes
expand ICurrentUser 'why' — HTTP lifecycle + testable in isolation; E10 strict passes; ceiling candidate
add Common Mistakes row for handler containing if-logic + delegation example in handler
tried condensing CQRS Bus callout to 2 conditions — E4 regressed in scenario H; reverted
tighten E16 — add standalone rule sentence in Interface Placement; 3 consecutive >=95% ceiling hit
add E21 — read access gate in Application vs domain invariant; fix Common Mistakes ambiguous 'if/business logic' row; move Interface Placement to reference file
add E22 — fetch-then-check (404/403 semantic) vs filter-in-query anti-pattern; document why GetByIdAsync must stay neutral; add ListByOwnerAsync exception for large lists
